description: Verify performance improvement after CPU governor fix
command: echo '=== CPU Governor ===' && cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_governor; echo '=== cpufrequtils status ===' && systemctl status cpufrequtils --no-pager || true; echo '=== Ollama version ===' && ollama --version; echo '=== Benchmark qwen3.5:4b ===' && ollama run qwen3.5:4b 'Count from 1 to 10' 2>&1 | tail -5; echo '=== Benchmark qwen3:8b ===' && ollama run qwen3:8b 'Count from 1 to 10' 2>&1 | tail -5
